GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks: dependency detection, quality validation, error handling
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: End-to-end compression with real PDF samples when Ghostscript is available
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Binary artifact verification across all three platforms
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log PDF content or file paths containing sensitive data.

VF-001.NAME: InteractiveCompression
VF-001.scenario: User runs pdf-kompakt with no args, selects file and quality, gets compressed PDF
VF-001.expected-outcome: Compressed PDF exists, terminal shows before/after stats

VF-002.NAME: NonInteractiveCompression
VF-002.expected-outcome: Compressed PDF produced at correct DPI without interactive prompts

required-signals.trace-sequence: argparse parse -> engine detect -> compress -> stats output

VF-003.NAME: EngineFallback
VF-003.scenario: Ghostscript not available, compression falls back to pypdf
VF-003.expected-outcome: Compression succeeds with lower ratio, terminal shows pypdf as engine

scenarios.scenario-1: Compression produces a valid PDF file
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing Ghostscript falls back to pypdf gracefully
scenarios.scenario-3: No PDF in directory produces clear error message
scenarios.scenario-4: Empty file is rejected with clear error
scenarios.scenario-6: Output same as input when compression yields no savings

V-M-CORE.wave-follow-up: Run compression against real-world PDF samples of varying sizes
V-M-CORE.phase-follow-up: Binary artifact test: download prebuilt binary, verify it compresses a test PDF

scenarios.scenario-2: Compression fallback tests cover both engines
scenarios.scenario-3: Quality level validation rejects invalid input

V-M-TESTS.wave-follow-up: Add edge case tests (empty files, corrupted PDFs, large files)
V-M-TESTS.phase-follow-up: Full regression with pytest coverage report

module-checks.check-1: Verify workflow triggers on v* tag push

scenarios.scenario-1: Tag push triggers build and creates release with all 3 binaries
scenarios.scenario-2: Build failure on one platform does not block other platforms

V-M-BUILD.wave-follow-up: Verify Homebrew tap produces working binary
V-M-BUILD.phase-follow-up: Full release smoke test on each platform

Gate-Phase-1.goal: CLI wizard works end-to-end with both engines

required-evidence.evidence-3: Both engines produce valid output PDFs

Gate-Phase-2.goal: Prebuilt binaries available and functional on all platforms

required-evidence.evidence-1: Latest release contains binaries for macOS, Linux, Windows
required-evidence.evidence-2: Each binary compresses a test PDF successfully
